exemplar.title: What features of knowledge have an impact on its reliability?

detailedExemplarData.title: What features of knowledge have an impact on its reliability?

strengths: Clear identification and precise real-world contexts for all three objects
Consistent, focused links to the IA prompt on reliability
Use of external references (Darwin, McLuhan, Piaget) to support explanations
Strong justifications showing how each object uniquely illuminates reliability
Logical structure with minimal repetition and effective visual support
weaknesses: Occasional generalisations and uneven depth in the analysis of Object 1
Missing explicit TOK terminology (e.g., âreliabilityâ) in some explanations
Some supporting references lack details (medium dimensions, page numbers)
Opportunities for deeper critical contrast (e.g., a case where an objectâs reliability fails) were not taken
Minor lapses in academic tone and completeness of sentences in places
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission meets the descriptors for band 7â8 by providing three well-contextualized objects, clear and well-explained links to the IA prompt, and strong, evidence-based justifications of how each object contributes to an understanding of reliability. The commentary moves beyond description into genuine analysis, and external references enrich the arguments. However, occasional surface-level treatmentâuneven depth in the first object, missing TOK terminology in places, and small lapses in completeness and referencingâprevent the work from fully achieving the sustained precision expected at the top of the 7â8 band. These minor weaknesses justify awarding a total of 7 out of 10.

annotations.comment: The heading for Object #1 clearly identifies the first artefact, satisfying the requirement for explicit object labelling.
Including the paintingâs image supports visual context; consider adding medium and dimensions in the caption to enrich its real-world specificity.
The student provides creator, date and location for Huntingtonâs painting, demonstrating excellent specificity in real-world context.
The description identifies features of knowledge (source, justification, acquisition) but would benefit from explicitly tying each back to 'reliability' using TOK terminology.
Use of the Darwin example grounds the historical context and effectively illustrates the evolution of reliability claims over time.
The final paragraph makes a broad claim about justification methods; adding a contemporary example (e.g., COVID-19 science vs. social media) would deepen the analysis of reliability.
The connection to the âKnowledge and the Knowerâ theme adds richness, but this reflection should explicitly mention its effect on reliability to tie back to the IA prompt.
The Exhibition title and inclusion of the IA prompt is clear and immediately frames the inquiry, demonstrating strong alignment with the TOK task.
The IA prompt âWhat features of knowledge have an impact on its reliability?â is stated prominently, ensuring the exhibition stays focused on the core question.
The critique of commercial motives affecting Vogueâs trustworthiness is insightful, highlighting financial incentives as a key reliability factor.
The McLuhan reference enriches the analysis of medium-influence but should explicitly state how âthe medium is the messageâ impacts reliability.
The summary of Vogueâs reliability is strong; adding a contrasting case where Vogueâs reliability fails would deepen critical perspective.
The transition to Object #3 is clearly marked, maintaining the structure expected for three distinct artefacts.
The title âMy First Piano Bookâ identifies the artefact but could specify publisher location to enhance context precision.
Publication details in the caption are well-provided, including date and authorship, solidifying the objectâs real-world context.
The personal anecdote anchors the object in the studentâs experience but should explicitly link features (e.g., pedagogy, expertise) back to reliability.
Mentioning the authorsâ pedagogical affiliations adds strong justification about why this book is a reliable source.
The emphasis on author expertise effectively demonstrates a feature of knowledge (authority) shaping reliability.
Applying Piagetâs constructivist theory adds depth to the accessibility argument; include a page or section number in the citation for completeness.
The integration of theory and practice clearly illustrates how pedagogical depth fosters the bookâs trustworthiness.
To deepen critical analysis, consider discussing a scenario where the methodâs reliability might be challenged (e.g., outdated pedagogy).
Object #2 is clearly labelled, fulfilling the requirement for three distinct objects with specific contexts.
The image of the Vogue issue contextualises the object well, but including the specific issue number on the cover would strengthen precision.
The archive citation for Vogue includes date and URL, showing good referencing of a specific object in a digital context.
The opening fragment of this paragraph is incomplete; ensure full sentences to maintain academic tone.
The discussion of Vogueâs authority under CondÃ© Nast and Anna Wintour is well-supported and shows clear understanding of how authority shapes reliability.
The works cited list shows a commendable range of sources but citation styles vary; standardize formatting (e.g., italics, punctuation).
The Pew Research Center citation effectively supports the historical example; it anchors the first objectâs context with reputable data.
Learning Theories: Constructivism is a solid academic reference; ensure in-text attributions match the full citation style in the list.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

three objects, but the
real-world contexts of

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
